subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ1.18
question_html:
Which properties can be monitored to determine the rate of the reaction?

Fe (s) + CuSO4 (aq) → Cu (s) + FeSO4 (aq)

    I. change in volume
    II. change in temperature
    III. change in colour

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III
examiners_html: One G2 form queried if visible spectroscopy is on the core syllabus and therefore should candidates be aware of monitoring a reaction via colour change. However, 6.1 clearly states that following change in colour is one method of following reactions.
